config_inputs.name: revisionId
config_inputs.description: Revision element ID to associate with the cloud

config_inputs.name: viewId
config_inputs.description: View element ID where the cloud will be placed

config_inputs.name: elementIds
config_inputs.description: JSON array of element IDs to bound the cloud around

config_inputs.name: minX
config_inputs.description: Bounding box min X in feet (alternative to elementIds)

config_inputs.name: minY
config_inputs.description: Bounding box min Y in feet

config_inputs.name: maxX
config_inputs.description: Bounding box max X in feet

config_inputs.name: maxY
config_inputs.description: Bounding box max Y in feet
